text: You came all the way here.

options.label: I wanted to see what was at the edge.
Someone mentioned the river. I was curious.
I walked until I couldn't walk further.

text:
And now that you're here?
Was it worth the walk?

options.label: Honestly I didn't expect to make it all the way.
I'm glad I did. Is this where you spend most of your time?
I thought it would go further than this.

text: Most things surprise you when you actually do them. Go on with your journey.
When I can. It gets crowded in my head elsewhere.
Most things don't. That's usually the point.
What did they say about it?

options.label: That it was worth seeing. They were right.
Not much. Just that you were here.
That it goes further than it looks.

text: People usually are, about the things they love.
There is only one way to know, but no one crossed it.

That's usually how the right things happen.
Does it go far enough for you?

options.label: I think so. I needed the walk more than the destination.
I don't know yet. I wasn't sure I was expecting company.
Not really. I'd keep going if I could.

text: Then you already got what you came for.
